messages.title: Report Button Added
messages.body: Hi, I’ve added a report button. Please use it if you find any errors with any quiz question or flashcard, and I’ll get it fixed ASAP.

messages.title: Endless Mode Added
messages.body: Endless Mode is now available at the top of each folder in the sidebar. It gives you random quiz questions from all files in that folder and tracks your current streak and best streak locally on this device.

messages.title: Favourites Added
messages.body: You can now star flashcards and quiz questions while studying. Starred items are saved locally and appear in a Favourites tab for the current study set. In Endless Mode, favourites are collected from across the whole folder.
